definitions.text: A specific commercial enterprise or establishment.
A person's occupation, work, or trade.
examples: He is in the motor and insurance businesses.
I'm going to Las Vegas on business.
He's such a poor cook, I can't believe he's still in business!
We do business all over the world.

definitions.text: Of, to, pertaining to, or used for purposes of conducting trade, commerce, governance, advocacy or other professional purposes.
examples: Please do not use this phone for personal calls; it is a business phone.

definitions.text: Professional, businesslike, having concern for good business practice.
Supporting business, conducive to the conduct of business.
